base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of map_sprites — a character (playable) from 1988 super mario bros 3. Map-view Mario/Luigi + mini-bosses + Hammer Bro/Boomerang Bro wanderers + Airship. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Map-view Mario/Luigi + mini-bosses + Hammer Bro/Boomerang Bro wanderers + Airship
